title: jacquemontia ochracea
intro: Jacquemontia ochracea, also known as Yellow Morning Glory or Mexican Clematis, is a flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Jacquemontia ochracea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and its roots can also be used to make a poultice for topical applications.
